problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
